case_title: FABIO VIANA DE CARVALHO VS. ESTUARDO GOLDINES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE CARVALHO, FABIO VIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDINES, ESTUARDO $1,047.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,087.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
